news.headline: Ribbon Communications Inc. reports strong Q3 2024 financial results: Revenue $210M, Non-GAAP EBITDA $30M, 11% YoY growth in Cloud & Edge revenue. CEO optimistic about Q4 2024.nextInt CFO effective November 1, 2024. Company expects revenue in Q4 2024 to range between $235-255M, with Non-GAAP gross margin projected between 55.5%-56%, and Adjusted EBITDA between $46-52M. Adjusted EBITDA is calculated by excluding certain expenses from income (loss) from operations. 18th Annual Needham Security, Networking, and Communications Conference on November 19, 2024. Non-GAAP financial measures used for performance evaluation. Earnings call scheduled for October 23, 2024, at 4:30 p.m. ET. Discusses revenue growth, cost of revenue, gross profit, operating expenses, income (loss) from operations, net income (loss), earnings per share, and weighted average shares used for computation of earnings per share. For full details, visit investors.ribboncommunications.com. Contact information available for Investor Relations and Media.
news.summary: Ribbon Communications Inc., a global provider of real-time communications technology, reported strong financial results for Q3 2024. Revenue reached $210 million, up from $203 million in Q3 2023 and $193 million in Q2 2024. GAAP Loss from Operations was ($1 million), but Non-GAAP Adjusted EBITDA improved to $30 million. GAAP and Non-GAAP Gross Margins stood at 52% and 55%, respectively. The company expects continued growth in Q4 and 2025, projecting 8% year-over-year sales growth for Q4. John Townsend will be the new CFO starting November 1, 2024. The upcoming Needham Security, Networking, and Communications Conference will be on November 19, 2024. The company's stock is listed on NASDAQ under RBBN. Information about non-GAAP financial measures and a full analysis is available on their Investor Relations website.

news.headline: Align Technology has announced iTero™ Intraoral Scanner product innovations aimed at enhancing digital dentistry workflows, providing integrated treatment options for general dentistry practices. The company offers Invisalign® System of clear aligners, iTero™ intraoral scanners, and exocad™ CAD/CAM software.
news.summary: Align Technology, Inc., a prominent medical device firm traded on NASDAQ under the symbol ALGN, shared details about its latest product innovations. The company, based in San Jose, Calif., along with locations in Tempe, Ariz., and Petach Tikva, Israel, is known for the Invisalign® System of clear aligners, iTero™ intraoral scanners, and exocad™ CAD/CAM software within the digital orthodontics and restorative dentistry field. The recent announcement highlighted advancements in the iTero intraoral scanner range aimed at offering a comprehensive solution for general practitioner dentists.

news.headline: Align Technology introduces Invisalign Smile Architect with Multiple Treatment Plans, expanding orthodontic and restorative dental options. #ALGN #Invisalign
news.summary: In a recent announcement, Align Technology, Inc. revealed the launch of the latest version of its Invisalign Smile Architect software. This software update includes a new feature called Multiple Treatment Plans, enabling orthodontists to compare and adjust various orthodontic and ortho-restorative treatment options visually. Align, traded as ALGN on Nasdaq, is a prominent global medical device company recognized for its Invisalign clear aligners, iTero intraoral scanners, and exocad CAD/CAM software for restorative dentistry. The introduction of this enhanced software aims to provide more comprehensive treatment options and customization for patients.

news.headline: Insurance company Goosehead reports Q3 2024 results.
news.summary: A new report indicates that the global economy is projected to grow by 5.6% in 2021, a significant increase from the 3.5% contraction experienced in 2020 due to the COVID-19 pandemic. The report forecasts a 4.0% growth in advanced economies and an 8.6% growth in emerging market and developing economies. However, these projections are subject to uncertainty and risks related to the pandemic, vaccine distribution, and economic policies. The report also highlights that extreme poverty is expected to increase by 97 million people in 2021, reversing a long trend of decline. Moreover, global trade volumes are projected to increase by 8.4% this year following a 9.5% decline in 2020. Vaccination campaigns, economic stimulus measures, and international cooperation are crucial for sustaining the economic recovery and ensuring more inclusive growth.

news.headline: L3Harris and Palantir form strategic partnership to enhance technology with NYSE: LHX and NYSE: PLTR, aiming for advanced capability.
news.summary: A new strategic partnership has been announced by L3Harris Technologies (NYSE: LHX) and Palantir Technologies Inc. (NYSE: PLTR) in Melbourne, Fla. This collaboration aims to advance technology development and speed up L3Harris’ digital transformation. The alliance combines L3Harris’ sensors and software-defined systems with Palantir’s Artificial Intelligence Platform (AIP), facilitating enhanced capability and connectivity across various domains. This partnership is set to enhance innovation and drive growth in the technology sector.

news.headline: T-Mobile sees impressive growth in Q3: 1.6M new customers, 865K postpaid phone adds, 415K internet customers.
news.summary: In Bellevue, Washington, T-Mobile US, Inc. (NASDAQ: TMUS) reports remarkable customer growth driven by their top-rated network and value proposition. They have achieved notable milestones in the industry, including 315,000 postpaid net account additions, 1.6 million postpaid net customer additions, and 865,000 postpaid phone net customer additions - all ranking as the best in the industry. Moreover, with a postpaid phone churn rate of 0.86%, a record low for Q3, and 415,000 new High-Speed Internet customers, T-Mobile continues to lead with the highest Q3 performance in a decade.

news.headline: Greenway Technologies develops H-Reformer®, converting natural gas to hydrogen and CO2. Modular system eliminates transport costs.
news.summary: A company in Arlington, Texas, known as Greenway Technologies, Inc. (OTC: GWTI), specializes in developing advanced gas-to-liquids ("GTL") and gas-to-hydrogen ("GTH") technologies. They have introduced a patented system called the G-Reformer®, which can convert methane from different sources into a mix of hydrogen and carbon monoxide (syngas). Recently, their research efforts led to the creation of a new model called the "H-Reformer®," designed to transform natural gas into hydrogen and carbon dioxide. This H-Reformer® system is modular and compact, making it feasible for deployment in proximity to consumption areas. This setup helps cut down on costs associated with compressing and transporting the generated hydrogen, as well as removing the produced carbon dioxide.

news.headline: Exclusive Coldplay concert tycoon experience in Fortnite at State Farm Park in iHeartLand on Oct 24.

news.summary: UnitedMasters and TikTok have formed a significant direct partnership to support independent artists. The announcement was made in Brooklyn, N.Y. on Oct. 23, 2024. UnitedMasters, known as a top music distribution platform for independent artists, unveiled the collaboration.
